word: H5259 - נָסַךְ - nâçak - naw-sak' - That is spread

sections.paragraph:
Original: נסך

Transliteration: nâsak

Phonetic: naw-sak'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Qal) to weave

Origin: a primitive root [probably identical with H5258 through the idea fusion]

TWOT entry: 1376

Part(s) of speech: Verb
